---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that is hard or impossible today? Describe it from the point of
view of a church using the site, not just the code.

## The idea

What you would like to see. Rough is fine.

## Who it helps

Which churches / roles (staff, volunteers, visitors) benefit, and roughly how common the
need is.

## Alternatives you've considered

Other ways to solve the same problem, if any.

## Keeping with the project's goals

Church4Christ aims to stay the simplest, cheapest way to run a church site. Does this fit
that, or is it a larger direction worth discussing first? (It's fine if you're not sure.)
